## Spec-Driven Development checklist

- [ ] `spec.md` updated for any user-visible change
- [ ] `openapi.yaml` updated; contract check passes locally
- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` unchanged OR change reviewed by tech lead
- [ ] `tasks.md` reflects the actual work done
- [ ] New endpoints have happy + error path tests
- [ ] No new top-level dependencies, OR justification + license check below
- [ ] No secrets, PII, GitHub tokens, or stack traces leaked in logs or responses
- [ ] Conventional Commit message; FR-id referenced if applicable

## AI-assisted development disclosure

- [ ] Portions of this PR were generated with Claude Code / an LLM
- [ ] Author has reviewed every changed line and accepts responsibility
- [ ] Generated code follows `CLAUDE.md` and our coding standards
